# Ünïcödé & a title that keeps going, and going, to test file-tree wrapping

This note exists mostly for its **filename** and **title**, both of which are
deliberately awkward:

- the filename carries non-ASCII characters (`ü`, `ï`, `ö`, `é`), and
- both the filename and this H1 are long enough to force the file tree,
  breadcrumb, and title bar to truncate or wrap.

The body itself is short. Some non-Latin text to render: café, naïve, Zürich,
Москва, 東京, 🐦🌿.

Back to [home](../index.md).
